headline: A Look At J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Event context and recent performance J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) has attracted investor attention after a recent period of strong share price moves, with the stock up about 14% over the past month and 23% in the past 3 months.
